name: clear
description: Remove all songs from the queue
detailDescription: Removes all songs from the queue at once. The currently playing song will continue until it ends or is skipped.

name: history
description: View recently played queues
detailDescription: Shows a list of recently played queues for this server. Each entry shows when it was played and how many songs it contained. Use /loadqueue to restore a previous queue.

options.name: page
options.description: Page number to display

name: loadqueue
description: Load a recently played queue
detailDescription: Restores a previously played queue from the server's history. Select from the list and songs will be added to your current queue. Any currently queued songs will remain.

name: loop
description: Change the Loop Mode
detailDescription: Changes how the queue repeats. Off plays through once, Track repeats the current song, and Queue loops the entire playlist back to the start when it ends.

options.name: mode
options.description: The loop mode

name: lyrics
description: Search for the lyrics of a specific song
detailDescription: Searches for and displays the lyrics of a song. If no song name is provided, it will look up lyrics for the currently playing track.

options.name: search_term
options.description: The search query, preferably the artist name and song name

name: move
description: Move a track in the queue to a different position
detailDescription: Moves a song from one position to another in the queue. Specify the current position and the target position to rearrange without removing and re-adding songs.

options.name: from
options.description: The position of the song to move in the queue

options.name: to
options.description: The position in the queue to move the song to

name: multiadd
description: Add multiple songs to the queue from a list
detailDescription: Opens a form where you can paste multiple song names or URLs, one per line. All songs will be searched and added to the queue at once.

name: next
description: Plays the next song in the queue
detailDescription: Skips to the next song in the queue. You can optionally specify a position to skip directly to a specific song in the queue.

options.name: position
options.description: The position in the queue to skip to

name: pause
description: Pauses the player
detailDescription: Pauses the currently playing song. The playback position is saved so you can resume from where you left off with /resume.

name: play
description: Play a song.
detailDescription: Plays a song by name or URL. Supports YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud, and direct links. If a playlist URL is provided, all songs will be added to the queue.

options.name: song
options.description: The name/url of the song to play.

options.name: next
options.description: Play as next song

name: prev
description: Plays the previous song in the queue
detailDescription: Goes back to the previously played song. Returns to the track that was playing before the current one.

name: queue
description: View a list of songs in the queue
detailDescription: Displays the current queue of songs with titles, artists, and positions. Results are paginated with 10 songs per page.

options.name: page
options.description: Displays the tracks in queue

name: remove
description: Remove one or many songs from the queue
detailDescription: Removes one or more songs from the queue by position. You can specify a range to remove multiple songs at once.

options.name: position
options.description: The queue position of the song to remove

options.name: end
options.description: The queue position of the last song to remove

name: resume
description: Resume the current song
detailDescription: Resumes playback of the currently paused song from where it was paused. Has no effect if the player is already playing.

name: search
description: Search for a song.
detailDescription: Searches for a song and shows the top results. Pick from the list to add it to the queue, with the option to play it next or at the end.

options.name: query
options.description: The song you want to search for.

name: seek
description: Seek to the specified time in the current song
detailDescription: Jumps to a specific time in the currently playing song. Accepts timestamps like 1:30, 90, or 1m30s. Cannot seek beyond the song's duration.

options.name: time
options.description: The time to seek to in format X:XX

name: shuffle
description: Shuffles the queue
detailDescription: Randomly reorders all songs in the queue. The currently playing song stays in place. Shuffling is immediate and cannot be undone.

name: songinfo
description: Get information about the current song
detailDescription: Shows detailed information about the currently playing song including title, artist, duration, source platform, and a link to the original.

options.name: position
options.description: Displays info about the current song

name: stop
description: Stops the player and quits the voice channel
detailDescription: Stops playback, clears the queue, and disconnects the bot from the voice channel. This completely ends the listening session.

name: volume
description: Sets the volume of the music player.
detailDescription: Adjusts the playback volume between 0 and 100. The default volume is 100. Changes take effect immediately on the current and future tracks.

options.name: value
options.description: The volume to set.

name: bindchannel
description: Bind the bot to a voice or text channel.
detailDescription: Restricts the bot to specific text and voice channels. When bound, the bot will only accept commands in the bound text channel and only join the bound voice channel.

options.name: add
options.description: Bind a channel.

options.name: remove
options.description: Unbind a channel.

options.name: clear
options.description: Clear all bound channels.

options.name: list
options.description: List all bound channels.

name: help
description: Show help for a command.
detailDescription: Shows detailed information about a specific command, including its parameters, types, and whether they are required.

options.name: command
options.description: The command to get help for.

name: info
description: Shows basic information about the bot.
detailDescription: Displays information about the bot including version, uptime, memory usage, server count, and the number of active music players.

name: w2g
description: Create a Watch2Gether room.
detailDescription: Creates a Watch2Gether room where you and your friends can watch videos together in sync. Optionally provide a URL to start watching immediately.

options.name: url
options.description: The video url to play in the new room.
